title: Aurobindo Pharma is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Aurobindo Pharma is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Aurobindo Pharma has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Delhi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Aurobindo Pharma:
Aurobindo Pharma is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Patient Care

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aurobindo Pharma!
